paper_metadata.title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
paper_metadata.abstract: We present Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model with an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding. Imagen builds on the power of large transformer language models in understanding text and hinges on the strength of diffusion models in high-fidelity image generation. Our key discovery is that generic large language models (e.g. T5), pretrained on text-only corpora, are surprisingly effective at encoding text for image synthesis: increasing the size of the language model in Imagen boosts both sample fidelity and image-text alignment much more than increasing the size of the image diffusion model. Imagen achieves a new state-of-the-art FID score of 7.27 on the COCO dataset, without ever training on COCO, and human raters find Imagen samples to be on par with the COCO data itself in image-text alignment. To assess text-to-image models in greater depth, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for text-to-image models. With DrawBench, we compare Imagen with recent methods including VQ-GAN+CLIP, Latent Diffusion Models, and DALL-E 2, and find that human raters prefer Imagen over other models in side-by-side comparisons, both in terms of sample quality and image-text alignment. See https://imagen.research.google/ for an overview of the results.

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen leverages large pre-trained language models (e.g., T5) to encode text for image synthesis, demonstrating that text-only models can be surprisingly effective for text-to-image generation. The key innovation is the use of frozen text encoders (e.g., T5) to map text to embeddings, combined with diffusion models for high-fidelity image generation.
extraction_data.extension: The model uses a decoder architecture and is trained on uncurated web-scale data, which introduces social and cultural biases. The paper highlights the need for future work on bias evaluation and mitigation in text-to-image models.
extraction_data.research_problem: Generating photorealistic images from text while addressing social and cultural biases in large language models.
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image synthesis, responsible AI
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen introduces a cascaded diffusion model architecture with text-conditioned base and super-resolution stages, using dynamic thresholding to prevent saturation and improve image fidelity.
extraction_data.research_problem: Text-to-image generation with high fidelity and alignment
extraction_data.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 GPU (as inferred from typical large-scale training requirements)
extraction_data.extension: Dynamic thresholding to prevent saturation in guided diffusion sampling
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen's 256x256 variant uses a super-resolution architecture to scale images from 64x64 to 256x256, improving resolution while maintaining alignment with text prompts.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Combination of internal datasets and Laion dataset
extraction_data.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 GPU (as inferred from typical large-scale training requirements)
extraction_data.extension: Cascaded diffusion model with noise conditioning augmentation
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling text-to-image models to higher resolutions while preserving photorealism and text alignment.
extraction_data.application: High-resolution text-to-image synthesis, photorealistic image generation at 256x256 resolution
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen's 1024x1024 variant further scales images to 1024x1024 resolution using a super-resolution architecture, maintaining high fidelity and text alignment.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Combination of internal datasets and Laion dataset
extraction_data.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 GPU (as inferred from typical large-scale training requirements)
extraction_data.extension: Cascaded diffusion model with noise conditioning augmentation
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling text-to-image models to very high resolutions while preserving photorealism and text alignment.
extraction_data.application: High-resolution text-to-image synthesis, photorealistic image generation at 1024x1024 resolution
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen introduces a text-to-image model with a large text encoder (T5-XXL) and a diffusion model architecture, enabling high fidelity and alignment with text prompts. It uses a classifier-free guidance mechanism to improve image-text alignment.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Combination of internal datasets and Laion dataset
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image synthesis, photorealistic image generation, caption-guided image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving text-to-image synthesis for photorealism and alignment with text prompts.
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Imagen uses a large, frozen T5-XXL text encoder to achieve state-of-the-art text-to-image alignment and fidelity, demonstrating that scaling the text encoder size is more impactful than scaling the U-Net.
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image synthesis, image generation with text guidance
extraction_data.research_problem: Text-to-image generation with high fidelity and alignment to text prompts
extraction_data.extension: Large-scale frozen language model (T5-XXL) as text encoder for improved text-to-image alignment
extraction_data.paper_title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
